column1: # Vampire Killer graphics catalogue - edit this, then run: make gfx
#   name        comma-separated ROM file offsets of RLE streams (decompressed & concatenated)
#   dest        VRAM destination the game loads it to (informational)
#   kind        sprite16 (16x16 1bpp hardware sprite) | tile4 (16x16 4bpp SCREEN 5 tile)
#   planes      1 = plain 1bpp; N>1 = MSX2 multicolor sprite, N consecutive 1bpp
#               planes are OR-combined into one visible sprite (the .png composites
#               them; the .txt keeps every plane separate for editing)

column6: Intro (Simon arriving at the castle): 8 two-plane Simon sprites. seg13, loaded after sub_5369h at 0x5682-0x56c7.
Intro sky (one stream, 10 patterns): patterns 0-7 = cloud shapes, patterns 8-9 = 2-frame bat flap (wings down / wings up). seg13, loaded at 0x56d0.

In-game Simon sprite cell 0 (VRAM 0xF800): 40 two-plane frames from seg13 pointer table 0xA281, indexed by 0xC42E; loaded by sub_56e8h (seg0 0x56E8). Walk/jump/whip/crouch/climb poses; a few frames shared with intro_simon.

In-game Simon sprite cell 1 (VRAM 0xF840): 36 frames from seg13 pointer table 0xA2D1, indexed by 0xC42F; loaded by sub_56e8h. Composites with cell 0; some entries are multi-cell frames (128/192B streams).
